figures.caption: Figure 7 Per-task spec length vs. original diff length for the three strategies (axes capped at 60K chars); the dashed line marks spec = original.
Figure 1 Full AfterVibe post-hoc spec (Part A + Part B).
Figure 8 Per-grader pass rates by code condition, conditioned on the 72 tasks whose correct code passes both VC and flex.

Figure 4 Overview of the AfterVibe workflow. From a vibe-coding session (trajectory T , summary M , code C), AfterVibe ➀ distills a specification S; ➁ extracts verification conditions and ➂ test commands (both validated on C as oracles); ➃ regenerates code C′ from S alone with a blind agent; and ➄ scores it with a three-tier verifier, iteratively refining S when the score is weak.
Figure 5 Extraction prompt for spec distillation (shortened for presentation).
